question: Is the photobombing man wearing neon green swim trunks (including his patterned shirt, exposed belly, and held drink) completely removed from the image?
Is the woman in the floral bikini (foreground subject) fully preserved with no changes to her outline, face, sunglasses, or raised arms?
Are the ocean wave ripples in the background reconstructed realistically and clearly visible, without being blurred or smudged?
Are the footprints in the sand clearly preserved and distinct, rather than being smoothed over or blurred out?
Is the sand texture in the edited area consistent with the surrounding granular beach surface, avoiding smooth patches or painterly artifacts?
Are the other background people (such as the child playing in the water and swimmers) completely unchanged?
Are the background static objects (colorful umbrellas, beach toys, buckets) preserved without distortion or color changes?
Is the lighting and shadow consistency maintained in the edited area (e.g., no leftover shadows of the removed man or mismatched brightness)?
Is the edited area free from visual artifacts such as ghosting, visible seams, or semi-transparent remnants of the removed person?
Is the image free from AI hallucinations, such as extra limbs, floating objects, or nonsensical elements introduced during the inpainting process?
